title: taraxacum microcarpum
intro: Taraxacum microcarpum, also known as small dandelion or micro dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and liver and kidney disorders, due to its health benefits such as reducing bloating and improving blood circulation. Taraxacum microcarpum can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the individual and the specific preparation.
